title: 2X AH-S3F Compatible Water Filter for Samsung Fridge DA29-00003F, HAFIN1/EXP, DA97-06317A-B, Aqua-Pure Plus, DA29-00003A, DA29-00003B
features: AquaHouse AH-S3F Water filter compatible with any Samsung fridge using filter models DA29-00003F, HAFIN1/EXP, DA97-06317A-B & other compatible versions of these models.

Filter uses the same locking mechanism as above filter references however will also fit the majority of Samsung fridges using this shape of filter. If your model is different please see images for locking key compatibility. For DA29-00003G we recommend using filter model AH-S3G, for DA29-00003A&B use AH-S3B.

Premium compatible water filter, has been independently tested and certified by the Water Quality Association's Gold Seal program. Only products that pass rigorous testing and pass annual manufacturing facility audits are accepted onto the Gold Seal certification.

Filter meets NSF/ANSI 42 standard for material safety, structural integrity, and has been tested for chlorine reduction. Also meets NSF/ANSI 372 standard for lead free compliance. This gives the user confidence the filter is of high quality and safe for use with drinking water.
6 Month filter life / 1135 Litres. AquaHouse branded filter, Aquahouse is a registered trademark.
description: Product Description AquaHouse AH-S3F Refrigerator Water Filter The AquaHouse AH-S3F Water filter is compatible with Samsung refrigerators using one of the following filter models: DA29-00003F, HAFIN1/EXP, DA29-00003G (newest model), HAFIN2/EXP (newest model), DA97-06317A-B, DA29-00003A, DA29-00003B. The filter has been independently tested to European and International standards Fits Aqua-Pure Plus filter holder in top right hand corner of refrigerator Please note this is a compatible spare part and the manufacturers' names and part numbers have been used for compatibility information only. Compatible connector to replace all current models DA29-00003F & DA29-00003G The AH-S3F filter uses the same shape connector as the original DA29-00003F model which is now also the same shape as the newest DA29-00003G / HAFIN2/EXP model. This filter is therefore compatible with Samsung fridges using this type of filter. To replace the older DA29-00003G model (with 3 locking teeth mechanism) we recommend using AquaHouse AH-S3G. Complies with relevant water filter safety standards Food Grade Materials The AH-S3G water filter is manufactured from food grade materials and is compliant to International and European standards, meeting EC 1935/2004 and EN 14898:2006, for safe use with drinking water. Coconut shell Activated Carbon The filter utilises a quality activated carbon block manufactured from natural coconut shell material. Same service schedule Same filter change schedule, replace every 6 months or 1135 Litres.
